creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-26 19:42:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/mpdbrowser     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/mpdbrowser/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  MPD click & play client
  
  mpdBrowser show your collection's covers and let you:
  - play an album with left click
  - Enqueue an album with left click and Control
  - Clear playlist with middle click
  - play a song with right click
  - enqueue a song with right click and Control
  
  WWW: http://www.gnomefiles.org/app.php/mpdBrowser
  
  PR:             ports/129955
  Submitted by:   Henrik Friedrichsen <hrkfdn at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1009    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/audio/mpdbrowser/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/mpdbrowser/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/audio/mpdbrowser/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/audio/mpdbrowser/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +51 -0     ports/audio/mpdbrowser/pkg-plist (new)
